title: Taiwan-based TSMC pledges another $100B to expand US chipmaking capacity
description:
The latest commitment appears to bring the company’s total pledges for investment in U.S. chipmaking to $265 billion.

title: BP, union dispute continues as local officials call for end to lockout at Whiting Refinery
description:
The labor dispute between BP and the United Steelworkers union continues to drag on as more local officials call for an end to a four-month lockout of more than 800 workers at the oil giant's Whiting Refinery.

description:

title: Independent tops spring secretary of state fundraising, Democrat amasses general election war chest
description:
Former GOP Indianapolis Mayor Greg Ballard, now an independent candidate for Indiana secretary of state, led the field in springtime fundraising, according to second-quarter filings due to the state Wednesday.

title: Do it Best to receive $3.4M in incentives for True Value relocation
description:
Fort Wayne-based Do it Best Group is set to receive $3.4 million in incentives from the state for relocating the corporate headquarters of its True Value Co. subsidiary.
